v.code: const inbox = ctx.getLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mbr_mgmt_inbox' }); if (!inbox || typeof inbox !== 'object') return; let opId = String(inbox.op_id || ''); const cleanup = () => { ctx.rmLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mbr_mgmt_inbox' }); }; const reject = (detail) => { ctx.writeLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mbr_mgmt_error' }, 'json', { op_id: opId, code: 'direct_model_mutation_disabled', detail }); cleanup(); }; if (inbox.version !== 'v1' || inbox.type !== 'pin_payload') { reject('unsupported_bridge_message'); return; } const sourceModelId = Number(inbox.source_model_id); if (!Number.isInteger(sourceModelId) || sourceModelId <= 0) { reject('unsupported_source_model'); return; } const route = ctx.getLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mbr_route_' + sourceModelId }); if (!route || typeof route !== 'object') { reject('missing_route'); return; } const routePin = String(route.pin || '').trim(); const routeType = String(route.type || '').trim(); const packetPin = String(inbox.pin || '').trim(); if (!routePin) { reject('missing_route_pin'); return; } if (routeType && routeType !== 'all' && routeType !== inbox.type) { reject('unsupported_route_type'); return; } if (packetPin && routePin !== packetPin) { reject('unsupported_route_pin'); return; } if (!Array.isArray(inbox.payload)) { reject('invalid_payload_shape'); return; } if (!opId) opId = 'pin_' + Date.now(); const seenKey = 'mbr_seen_' + opId; if (ctx.getLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: seenKey })) { cleanup(); return; } ctx.writeLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: seenKey }, 'str', '1'); const ts = (typeof inbox.timestamp === 'number' && Number.isFinite(inbox.timestamp)) ? inbox.timestamp : Date.now(); const event = { version: 'v1', type: 'pin_payload', op_id: opId, source_model_id: sourceModelId, pin: routePin, payload: inbox.payload, timestamp: ts }; const base = String(ctx.getLabel({ model_id: 0, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mqtt_topic_base' }) || ''); const topic = base ? (base + '/' + sourceModelId + '/' + routePin) : ''; if (!topic) { reject('missing_mqtt_topic_base'); return; } ctx.publishMqtt(topic, event); cleanup();

const inbox = ctx.getLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mbr_mqtt_inbox' }); if (!inbox || typeof inbox !== 'object') return; const payload = inbox.payload; if (!payload || typeof payload !== 'object') return; if (payload.version !== 'v1' || payload.type !== 'pin_payload' || !Array.isArray(payload.payload)) return; const opId = String(payload.op_id || ''); if (!opId) return; const seenKey = 'mbr_seen_' + opId; if (!ctx.getLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: seenKey })) { ctx.writeLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: seenKey }, 'str', '1'); } ctx.writeLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'change_out' }, 'MGMT_OUT', payload); ctx.rmLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mbr_mqtt_inbox' });

const event = { version: 'v0', type: 'mbr_ready', op_id: 'mbr_heartbeat_' + Date.now(), timestamp: Date.now() }; ctx.writeLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mbr_heartbeat_out' }, 'MGMT_OUT', event);

const event = { version: 'v0', type: 'mbr_ready', op_id: 'mbr_ready_' + Date.now(), timestamp: Date.now() }; ctx.writeLabel({ model_id: -10, p: 0, r: 0, c: 0, k: 'mbr_ready_out' }, 'MGMT_OUT', event);
